definition: Random-initialized blind training with scaffold initializers disabled.
denominator_rule: pure-blind suite rows only; scaffolds, warm starts, repairs, and perturbed starts excluded
safe_public_claim: Only verifier-recovered rows in this class may support pure blind recovery rates.
claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible

definition: Blind training with declared structural scaffold initializers.
denominator_rule: scaffolded rows are denominated separately from pure blind rows
safe_public_claim: Useful optimizer evidence, but not pure blind discovery.
claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible

definition: Training initialized from a compiled EML expression.
denominator_rule: warm_start rows are denominated separately from pure blind rows
safe_public_claim: Basin or compiler-assisted evidence, not random-initialized discovery.
claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible

definition: Runs that return the exact compiled or known target AST.
denominator_rule: same_ast rows are denominated separately from pure blind rows
safe_public_claim: Strong representational and basin evidence, not discovery from scratch.
claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible

definition: Known true-tree starts perturbed before optimization.
denominator_rule: perturbed_basin rows are denominated separately from pure blind rows
safe_public_claim: Measures local basin stability, not blind search.
claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible

definition: Verifier-gated local repair or frozen-structure constant refit after snapping.
denominator_rule: repair_refit rows are denominated separately from pure blind rows
safe_public_claim: Post-snap improvement evidence, not the original optimizer discovery event.
claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible

denominator_rule: compile_only rows are denominated separately from pure blind rows
safe_public_claim: Representation support or unsupported diagnostics, not training recovery.
claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible

definition: Rows blocked by support gates, compile depth, missing witnesses, or explicit unsupported status.
denominator_rule: visible negative rows inside their original regime denominator
safe_public_claim: Must remain visible in denominators where eligible and never count as recovered.
claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible

definition: Rows that ran but failed verifier recovery, snapping, or acceptable numerical criteria.
denominator_rule: visible negative rows inside their original regime denominator
safe_public_claim: Must remain visible and never count as recovered.
claim_boundary: do not merge this class into pure blind discovery unless explicitly eligible
